fields.summary: End to end unit test with mini YARN cluster for AMRMProxy Service

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description: YARN-2884 introduces a proxy between AM and RM. This JIRA proposes an end to end unit test using mini YARN cluster to the AMRMProxy service. This test will validate register, allocate and finish application and token renewal.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

This message was automatically generated.

I just ran all the tests that failed or timed out and they completed fine in my machine.

My only concern is about the checkstyle.

[~jianhe], thanks for reviewing the patch.
1. Sure;
2. Sure, I will check it.
3. Because I can customize CustomContainerManagerImpl and AMRMProxyService.
MiniYarnCluster allocates the ports for the RM during the Start phase, and there was no way to pass the information to the AMRMProxy. 
For this reason I save the value of the Scheduler address and in the Customizazion I inform the AMRMProxy what is the address it will connect to. 
4. The purpose of testE2ETokenSwap is to verified that the AMRMProxy swapped the security token and the AM cannot submit the job directly to the RM. 

I will update the patch according to the feedback.
